news.t: ALLSPRING LAUNCHES ACTIVELY MANAGED EQUITY ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AGRW is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.86%, Alphabet at 6.99%, Apple at 6.78%, Microsoft at 5.57%, and Broadcom at 5.32%.

overview.description: The Allspring LT Large Growth ETF (AGRW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of large-cap growth US companies. The fund utilizes a proprietary, fundamental approach to investing. AGRW was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.

data.title: ALLSPRING LAUNCHES ACTIVELY MANAGED EQUITY ETFs
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., March 27, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Allspring Global Investments™, a global asset management firm with $605 billion* in assets under advisement, today launched its inaugural active equity ...
